string.text: Incoming Transmission
Select Response
Communications Centre
Task received. Check your PDA for details.
Unable to process task request at this time.
Received $amount RU via electronic transfer.
$amount RU deducted from account.
Your reputation in the Zone has improved.
Your reputation in the Zone has suffered.
$faction relations improved by $amount points.
$faction relations decreased by $amount points.
Received: $what
Stash coordinates received. Check your map.
Insufficient funds for this transaction.
WARNING: Hostile contacts detected in your area.
ALERT: Hostile forces approaching your position.
Friendly contacts inbound to your area.
Friendly units have arrived in your sector.
Reinforcements have linked up with your position.
WARNING: Anomalous biological signatures detected.
DANGER: Mutant contact confirmed in your vicinity.
A courier is en route to your location.
You need to have your PDA open to make a choice.
The hunting party seems to have lost interest and moved on.
$player_name, thank god you answered. We're pinned down near the old factory, and we're almost out of ammo and meds. We need supplies, fast. I'll pay well , 5000 RU if you get here within the hour.
What exactly do you need? I'll check my inventory.
I'm close by. Send the list , I'm on my way.
5000? That's too low for a firefight rescue. Make it 8000 upfront, and I'll come.
Sorry, can't help. I'm in the middle of something.
We need ammo (9x19, 5.45), medkits, and maybe some anti-rad. I'm sending the exact manifest now.
Bless you! I'm uploading the list. Get here quick , we're holding on.
We don't have that kind of cash pooled, but we could scrape together 6000. Half now, half when you deliver. Deal?
Damn, good luck out there.
none
give_task_cat:fetch
reward_money:3000
punish_gw:10:stalker
Alright, send the list. I'm coming.
I'll need some extra gear , can you spare a weapon?
On second thought, this is too dangerous. Keep your money.
I'll do it, but you owe me a favour later.
Manifest uploaded. Hurry!
I can leave you a pistol at the factory entrance. It's not much, but it's something.
Fine. We'll find someone else.
You've got it. Just get here alive.
give_task_cat:fetch
give_task_cat:fetch, courier_item:wpn_beretta
punish_money:3000, punish_gw:15:stalker
give_task_cat:fetch, reward_gw:10:stalker
Attention all loners , a bandit camp has popped up near the railway bridge, harassing our patrols. We need a volunteer to clear them out. Payment: 8000 RU, plus whatever loot you find.
How many bandits are we talking?
I'll do it. Send coordinates.
8000? I want 10k, or I walk.
Bandits are my specialty. I'll need a scout report first.
At least six, maybe more. They've got a couple of rifles and a shotgun. The camp is fortified with sandbags.
Coordinates uploaded. Good hunting.
Alright, 9k final offer. Take it or leave it.
I'll have our scout upload what he saw. Check your PDA.
none
give_task_cat:assault
none
none
Six bandits? I can handle that. Send the job.
Too many for one person. I'll need backup , can you send a couple of guys?
I'll need some explosives to flush them out. Can you supply?
Actually, I'm not up for it today.
Job posted. Check tasks.
We're stretched thin, but I can send one volunteer. He'll meet you at the bridge.
I can leave a couple of grenades at the old tractor near the camp.
Alright, stay safe.
give_task_cat:assault
give_task_cat:assault, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:assault, courier_item:ammo_vog-25
punish_gw:5:stalker
9k is acceptable. I'll take the job.
Make it 9k and a decent rifle, and you have a deal.
You drive a hard bargain. I'm in.
Nah, still not enough. Find someone desperate.
Great. Coordinates uploaded.
I can leave an AK at the stash point. Don't let me down.
Good man. Job's yours.
Fine. Next time.
give_task_cat:assault
give_task_cat:assault, courier_item:wpn_ak74
give_task_cat:assault
punish_gw:10:stalker
$player_name, I have a discreet contract. There's a stalker named "Slick" who's been selling our patrol routes to bandits. He needs to disappear. Payment is 12k, no questions asked.
How do you know he's the traitor?
12k is good. Send me his location.
I don't kill stalkers, even traitors. But I could capture him for you.
Count me out. I'm not an assassin.
We caught him red-handed transmitting coordinates. His PDA logs don't lie. I can share the evidence if you want.
He's usually at the merc camp near the depot. I'll pin his last known position.
Capture? That's riskier, but if you can bring him in alive, we'll pay 15k. Deal?
Understood. I'll find someone with fewer scruples.
none
give_task_cat:bounty
none
none
Alright, I'm convinced. Send the job.
Even with proof, I'm not a killer. I'll pass.
Maybe I can talk to him first. Give me his location.
I'll do it, but I want 15k.
Job uploaded. Make it clean.
Fair enough. We'll manage.
He's beyond talking, but suit yourself. Coordinates sent.
We can do 13k, final. Take it or leave it.
give_task_cat:bounty
punish_gw:5:stalker
none
none
Capture it is. Send me his location.
I'll need help to take him alive. Can you spare a man?
On second thought, killing is easier. I'll take the 12k.
Too risky. Find another sucker.
Location uploaded. Remember , alive.
I'll send a guy to back you up. He'll meet you at the depot.
Alright, 12k it is. Job posted.
Fine. We'll find someone else.
give_task_cat:bounty, reward_money:3000
give_task_cat:bounty, reward_money:3000, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:bounty
punish_gw:10:stalker
13k works. I'm in.
13k and a rifle. Then we talk.
I'll do it for 13k, but you owe me.
No deal.
Job's yours. Location uploaded.
We can spare a worn AK. Deal.
We'll remember this. Job posted.
Your loss.
give_task_cat:bounty
give_task_cat:bounty, courier_item:wpn_ak74
give_task_cat:bounty, reward_gw:5:stalker
punish_gw:5:stalker
$player_name, I need a courier job done. I have a package that needs to get to an associate, but I'm tied down here. You up for a quick run? Payment is 4000 RU.
What's in the package?
Sure, I'll do it. Send the drop point.
4000 is too low for a courier job. Make it 6000.
I'm not your errand boy. Find someone else.
Just some documents and a few artifacts. Nothing dangerous, I promise. The recipient is waiting.
Great. I'm uploading the waybill and coordinates to your PDA now.
I can do 5000. That's my final offer.
Suit yourself. I'll ask around.
none
give_task_cat:delivery
none
punish_gw:5:stalker
Alright, I'll take it. Send details.
I'm worried about stalkers along the route. Can you provide an escort?
I want half upfront.
Actually, I'm not interested.
Details sent. It's a straight shot , you'll be fine.
I can have one of our guys meet you halfway. He'll watch your back.
I can send 2000 now. The rest on delivery.
Alright, stay safe.
give_task_cat:delivery
give_task_cat:delivery, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:delivery, reward_money:2000
punish_gw:5:stalker

$player_name, emergency. One of our guys got jumped and taken hostage by a hostile squad. They're holding him at a nearby camp. We need someone to breach the camp and get him out alive. Reward: 10,000 RU.
How many hostiles are we talking about?
I'm on it. Send the coordinates.
10k is too low for a rescue mission. Make it 15k.
Hostage rescues are suicide. Find someone else.
At least five, heavily armed. They're holed up in an old warehouse. We have the layout.
Thank you. I'm uploading the camp location and the hostage's signal now.
We can do 12k, but that's stretching us thin. Deal?
We'll find someone braver, then.
none
give_task_cat:rescue
none
punish_gw:10:stalker
I'll do it. Send the details.
I'll need backup , can you spare a couple of guys?
I want better weapons. Can you supply?
On second thought, it's too risky. I'm out.
Details uploaded. Bring him home.
I can send two volunteers. They'll meet you at the bridge.
I can leave a shotgun and some meds at the stash point near the camp.
We'll manage. Good luck.
give_task_cat:rescue
give_task_cat:rescue, spawn_companion:stalker:60, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:rescue, courier_item:wpn_bm16, courier_item:medkit_army
punish_gw:15:stalker
Attention stalkers. The Ecologists are paying top dollar for fresh field measurements from active anomaly fields. You'll need a detector and some nerve. Anyone interested? Payment: 6000 RU.
What kind of measurements are we talking about?
I have my detector ready. Upload the anomaly coordinates.
6000? I'll do it for 8000.
I try to stay out of anomalies, not walk into them. Pass.
Just get close to the core and hold your position until the scanner finishes. Watch out for mutants, they're drawn to the emissions. Coordinates attached.
Excellent. Area coordinates are transmitting now. Be careful.
We can do 7000. That's the max the Ecologists will pay.
Suit yourself. More money for the rest of us.
none
give_task_cat:measure
none
none
Alright, I'll do it. Send the job.
I'm worried about mutants. Can you send backup?
I need a better detector. Can you provide one?
Still not worth it. I'm out.
Job posted. Good luck.
I can send a guard to watch your back. He'll meet you at the entrance.
The Ecologists lent us a scientific detector. I can have it delivered to you.
Alright, stay safe.
give_task_cat:measure
give_task_cat:measure, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:measure, courier_item:stimpack_scientic
none

$player_name, we lost contact with a patrol squad a few hours ago. We need someone to track their last known coordinates and find out what happened to them. Recover their PDA if they didn't make it. Reward: 7000 RU.
What was their last known location?
I'll track them down. Send me the sector data.
7000 is too low for a search and rescue. Make it 9000.
If they're gone, they're gone. Not risking my neck.
I'm uploading the search radius to your PDA. Comb the area. If they're dead, just bring the PDA back to us.
Thanks. Search area is marked on your PDA. Be careful, whatever got them might still be out there.
We can do 8000, but that's all we have.
We leave no one behind. We'll find someone else.
none
give_task_cat:fate
none
punish_gw:10:stalker
I'll do it. Send the job.
This sounds dangerous. Can you send someone with me?
I want half upfront.
Actually, I'm not comfortable with this. Find someone else.
Job posted. Bring back answers.
I can send one volunteer. He'll meet you at the marked zone.
I'll transfer 4000 now. Rest on completion.
Alright, stay safe.
give_task_cat:fate
give_task_cat:fate, spawn_companion:stalker:60
give_task_cat:fate, reward_money:4000
punish_gw:5:stalker
We've got a serious mutant problem. A pack has moved into our territory and is making the routes impassable. We need a hunter to go to their lair and wipe them out. Payment: 9000 RU.
What kind of mutants are we dealing with?
I'll clear the lair. Send the coordinates.
9000 is too low for a mutant hunt. Make it 12k.
Find a dedicated hunter. I'm busy.
I'm attaching the threat profile and location to your PDA now. Looks like a mix of blind dogs and a couple of snorks. Nasty.
Good hunting. Coordinates uploaded. Watch your back in there.
We can do 10k, final offer.
Understood. Stay safe.
none
give_task_cat:eliminate
none
none
Alright, I'll take the job. Send details.
I'll need better weapons for snorks. Can you supply?
I want half upfront.
On second thought, not worth it. I'm out.
Details uploaded. Good luck.
I can leave a shotgun and some buckshot at the entrance to the lair.
I'll transfer 5000 now. Rest on completion.
Alright, stay safe.
give_task_cat:eliminate
give_task_cat:eliminate, courier_item:wpn_bm16, courier_item:ammo_12x70_buck
give_task_cat:eliminate, reward_money:5000
punish_gw:5:stalker
$player_name, I've got coordinates to a stash that an old contact told me about. I'm too busy to go myself, but if you retrieve whatever's inside, we split the loot. Deal? Your cut: 50%.
What kind of stash are we talking about?
I'm always up for a treasure hunt. Send the coordinates.
50% is too low. I want 70%.
Not interested. Keep your stash.
Not sure exactly, but the contact was reliable. Could be artifacts, weapons, or just junk. I'm uploading the marker to your PDA now. Bring back whatever you find and we'll meet up later.
Great. I've pinned the location on your map. Watch out for any traps or stalkers who might have found it first.
60%, final offer. Take it or leave it.
Fine. I'll find someone else who appreciates easy money.
none
give_task_cat:stash
none
none
Alright, I'll go. Send details.
I'll need a weapon if there are guards. Can you provide?
I want a share upfront , pay me 2000 now.
Actually, I'm not interested.
Details uploaded. Good luck.
I can leave a pistol at the stash entrance.
I'll send 2000 now. Fair?
Alright, maybe next time.
give_task_cat:stash
give_task_cat:stash, courier_item:wpn_beretta
give_task_cat:stash, reward_money:2000
none
